pages.text: Overworld:   [Coal Chest] → [PreFab NORTH face: PULL ITEMS → Importer #1]$(br2)CM Dimension (while SIMULATING):   [Importer #1] → [Furnace] → [Exporter #1]   (PreFab measures: 0.213 iron ingots/tick)$(br2)Overworld:   [PreFab SOUTH face: PUSH ITEMS ← Exporter #1] → [Iron Chest]$(br2)During CACHED mode: $(li)CM dimension chunks unload $(li)PreFab accumulates fractional production (0.213/tick) $(li)Every ~5 ticks, PreFab pushes 1 iron ingot to output chest $(li)No chunk loading = Better server TPS.
